text:
# April 20, 2026  
Monday again. The weekend went too fast. Back to the daily routine.  
Morning rush as usual. Dropped Neetish at school. She's been quiet lately. Might be the exam pressure. Need to talk to her tonight.  
Office was chaotic. The new project has some technical issues. Spent the whole day solving them. Had to skip lunch. By evening, everyone was tired but we managed to fix the critical problems.  
Preeti picked up the kids. She mentioned that Neetish didn't eat her tiffin properly at school. Will check what's going on with her.  
Mohan has been fighting with his friend Aryan again. This is becoming a regular thing. Need to have a conversation with him.  
Evening walk with Browny. He's getting better at not pulling the leash. Proud of him.  
Preeti made order from Swad (our favorite Indore restaurant). Ordered dal makhani and naan. The kids were happy.  
Helped Neetish with her project before sleep. She seems more relaxed now.
